title: chaetoseris lutea
intro: Chaetoseris lutea, also known as the yellow dandelion or yellow hawk's beard, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the dandelion family. This plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Chaetoseris lutea include reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and treating respiratory problems, making it a valuable remedy for various ailments. In traditional Chinese medicine, Chaetoseris lutea is often prepared as a tea, decoction, or infusion, and is also used in herbal tinctures and capsules to harness its medicinal properties.
